{{Infobox madra
| name = Heaven’s Glory madra
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Heaven’s Glory madra]] splatters against [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Heaven’s Glory madra]] feels like a wildfire.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The man blasted through three layers of [[Forged Heaven’s Glory]] [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
